mxCell.value:
Spatial Distributed Model 
(Separate Cells)
Hydrological routing through river network
Direct Routing to the Outlet (MAXBAS Function)

- Distributed precipitation 
  based on cell resolution
- Sub-catchment do not 
   interact

- Distributed precipitation 
  based on cell resolution
- flow is routed from
  higher elevation cells to 
  downstream lower cells 
- Different parameters for 
  each cell
run HBV96 for the whole time series for each cell individually

Calibration
read data then run optimization algorithm & objective function

You can add any info
related to the flood
event to this dict
